AAPL.note: iPhone cash cow, services flywheel compounding margins. $3T ecosystem lock-in.
AAPL.risk: iPhone upgrade cycle stalling, China demand erosion, services regulatory risk

ABBV.note: pharma giant. Humira biosimilar competition phased, Skyrizi + Rinvoq immunology growth.
ABBV.risk: Patent cliffs, biosimilar erosion, pipeline setbacks

ABNB.note: travel marketplace. Host supply growth drives take rate. Cyclical travel demand exposure.
ABNB.risk: Travel demand normalization post-revenge-spend, host regulation risk, hotels competing on price

ADBE.note: creative software monopoly. Photoshop, Acrobat, Experience Cloud. AI Firefly monetization.
ADBE.risk: AI disruption of creative tools, subscription fatigue, Figma deal regulatory risk

AFRM.note: buy-now-pay-later platform for e-commerce. Interest income + merchant network growth. Consumer credit cycle exposure.
AFRM.risk: consumer credit losses in downturn, merchant concentration, rising funding costs

AMAT.note: semiconductor equipment. Sells the picks and shovels to the chip cycle.
AMAT.risk: Chip equipment cycle downturn, China export restrictions, Korea capex cuts

AMD.note: Intel's only real x86 rival. MI300 taking GPU share from NVDA in inference workloads.
AMD.risk: GPU share gains priced in, x86 slowdown from Intel comeback, console cycle declining

AMZN.note: AWS margins fund retail dominance. Logistics moat nobody can replicate at scale.
AMZN.risk: AWS growth slowing, retail margin compression, re-investment cycle eating FCF

APP.note: mobile ad tech platform. Game monetization + AI-driven ad optimization/AppLovin.
APP.risk: Ad market cyclicality, Apple ATT impact, high multiple de-risking

ARM.note: Arm architecture licensing. Royalty model. AI data center adoption is the growth story.
ARM.risk: Royalty rate compression, client concentration (Google/Apple), high-multiple de-rating risk

ASML.note: EUV lithography monopoly. Every advanced chip needs their machines. China export risk.
ASML.risk: China export restrictions are the binary risk, EUV shipment delays, fab capex pull-ins already price the upside

AVGO.note: Custom AI silicon for Google and Meta. VMware acquisition shifts mix toward recurring software revenue.
AVGO.risk: VMware integration risk, customer concentration (Google/Meta buy 40%+ of revenue), semiconductor cyclicality

BAC.note: money-center bank. Consumer + commercial. Net interest income and rate sensitivity.
BAC.risk: Rate cuts compress NII, credit cycle deterioration, regulatory capital requirements

BLK.note: asset management colossus. iShares ETF monopoly. Aladdin risk platform. $10T AUM.
BLK.risk: AUM outflows in risk-off, fee compression, Aladdin competition

BMY.note: big pharma. Revlimid patent cliff, Opdivo oncology franchise. Pipeline M&A (Karuna) story.
BMY.risk: Revlimid erosion, Opdivo patent cliff, pipeline disappointments

CAT.note: heavy machinery and construction equipment. Global infrastructure / mining capex. China demand macro bellwether.
CAT.risk: China construction slowdown, commodity price collapse, inventory destocking

CDNS.note: EDA software. Cadence, chip design tools for semiconductor industry. AI-assisted design.
CDNS.risk: Semiconductor cycle downturn, Synopsys competition, AI design disruption

CFLT.note: Confluent. Managed Kafka streaming data. Event streaming for real-time apps.
CFLT.risk: Cloud hyperscaler competition, consumption growth volatility, path to profitability

CHTR.note: cable broadband monopoly. Spectrum brand. Video cord-cutting continues, broadband grows.
CHTR.risk: Broadband subscriber loss, wireless competition, video decline

CHWY.note: online pet food and pharmacy subscription. Chewy brand. Sticky auto-ship revenue.
CHWY.risk: Customer acquisition slowdown, margin compression, competition from Amazon/retailers

CMCSA.note: cable + NBCUniversal. Broadband pricing. Peacock streaming. Theme parks.
CMCSA.risk: Broadband saturation, streaming losses, theme parks cyclicality

COIN.note: crypto exchange. Revenue volatile with trading volumes. Diversifying into staking and Base L2.
COIN.risk: Crypto volume collapse in risk-off, regulation (SEC), staking revenue under legal threat

COP.note: oil and gas exploration. Permian and Alaska assets. Production growth story.
COP.risk: Oil price collapse, capital discipline erosion, energy transition pressure

COST.note: membership warehouse retail. Low prices, ultra-loyal customers, defensive consumer play.
COST.risk: membership growth saturation, international expansion execution, wage inflation

CRM.note: Salesforce. CRM cloud leader. Data Cloud + AI. Acquisitions (Slack, Tableau) integration.
CRM.risk: Growth deceleration, AI monetization pressure, executive turnover

CRWD.note: endpoint security leader. Falcon platform dominance. Recovery from 2024 outage.
CRWD.risk: Post-outage churn risk, PANW and S competitive pressure, large-enterprise deal lengthening

CVX.note: integrated supermajor. Permian, LNG, renewables. Dividend fortress.
CVX.risk: Oil price collapse, energy transition, mega-project cost overruns

CYBR.note: cybersecurity. Privileged access management (PAM). Identity security.
CYBR.risk: Competition from larger platforms, sales cycle elongation, breach risk

DDOG.note: cloud infrastructure monitoring. Multi-cloud observability play. Usage-based revenue.
DDOG.risk: Cloud spend optimization hitting usage revenue, competition from Grafana and Splunk

DE.note: agricultural equipment. John Deere precision farming. Commodity price sensitivity.
DE.risk: Commodity price collapse, farm income decline, high inventory

DIS.note: media empire in transition. Streaming profitability improving. Parks cash cow. Linear TV decline.
DIS.risk: Linear TV decline accelerating, streaming unprofitability, parks cyclicality, CEO transition risk

DKNG.note: sports betting and iGaming platform. State legalization tailwind. Marketing spend intensive.
DKNG.risk: State regulatory setbacks, marketing ROI pressure, competition from FanDuel

DOCN.note: developer cloud for SMBs. Simple pricing vs AWS. Niche player with sticky revenue.
DOCN.risk: Hyperscaler price war crushing SMB cloud pricing, scale disadvantage, churn risk in down cycle

DUOL.note: language learning app. Subscription growth and DAU engagement. AI-powered content creation.
DUOL.risk: Language learning market saturation, AI competition from ChatGPT, monetization ceiling uncertain

ELF.note: mass-market beauty / cosmetics. Gen Z brand power. Growth outpacing legacy beauty.
ELF.risk: Category slowdown, retailer concentration, valuation de-rating

EOG.note: shale oil and gas. Permian + Bakken. Low-cost producer. Capital returns focused.
EOG.risk: Oil price collapse, well productivity degradation, shareholder return sustainability

ESTC.note: Elastic. Search + observability + security. Open-source ELK stack. Consumption pricing.
ESTC.risk: Consumption growth volatility, OpenSearch competition, cloud spending slowdown

ETSY.note: handmade / artisan e-commerce. Pandemic pull-forward normalizing. Marketplace flywheel.
ETSY.risk: GMV deceleration, fee increase pushback, Amazon/eBay competition

EXPE.note: online travel agency. Expedia / Hotels.com brands. Travel recovery and margin story.
EXPE.risk: Travel demand normalization, Google competition, hotel direct booking push

FIS.note: fintech infrastructure. Core banking and payments tech. Spun out Worldpay.
FIS.risk: Banking IT spend slowdown, Worldpay spin complexity, margin pressure

FTNT.note: Fortinet. Network security (firewall) + SASE. Enterprise cybersecurity leader.
FTNT.risk: SASE market crowding, firewall commoditization, billings growth deceleration

GE.note: conglomerate breakup. Vernova (power/renewables) and GE Aerospace spin. Aviation is core.
GE.risk: Aerospace cycle downturn, supply chain disruption, spin execution

GILD.note: biotech. HIV treatment leader, cell therapy and oncology pivot. M&A for growth.
GILD.risk: HIV franchise maturation, oncology pipeline setbacks, M&A integration

GOOGL.note: Search ad monopoly under regulatory pressure. YouTube and Cloud are the real growth drivers.
GOOGL.risk: Search disruption from AI chatbots, antitrust breakup risk, YouTube ad pricing pressure

GS.note: investment bank + wealth management. Trading, M&A, asset management. Market proxy.
GS.risk: Trading/M&A revenue cyclicality, regulatory scrutiny, consumer banking losses

GTLB.note: DevOps platform. AI-powered CI/CD. Usage-based revenue. Competing with Microsoft GitHub.
GTLB.risk: GitHub (Microsoft) competition, AI feature monetization uncertain, usage-based revenue volatile

HD.note: home improvement retail fortress. Housing turnover and rate sensitive. Cyclical but margin resilient.
HD.risk: housing market freeze from high rates, DIY demand normalization, lumber cost volatility

HON.note: industrial conglomerate. Aerospace, building tech, safety. Software-driven manufacturing.
HON.risk: Aerospace cycle, China exposure, conglomerate discount

HOOD.note: retail brokerage. Payment for order flow model. Crypto and options revenue growing.
HOOD.risk: PFOF regulatory risk, crypto volume volatility, retail trading decline in bear markets

IBM.note: hybrid cloud + consulting + mainframe. AI (Watson, Granite). Turnaround story.
IBM.risk: Consulting demand cyclicality, AI monetization lag, mainframe decline

ILMN.note: DNA sequencing. Genomics tools for clinical and research. Short-read monopoly under pressure.
ILMN.risk: Long-read competition (PacBio/ONT), clinical reimbursement, growth slowdown

INTC.note: semiconductor foundry. IDM 2.0 strategy. Catching TSMC in process nodes. Capex heavy.
INTC.risk: Process node delays, foundry losses, market share loss to AMD/ARM

INTU.note: financial software. TurboTax and QuickBooks. Mint shutdown. AI-assisted finances.
INTU.risk: Free filing competition, SMB downturn, AI disruption of tax prep

ISRG.note: surgical robotics. Da Vinci install base drives recurring instrument sales. Procedure growth tailwind.
ISRG.risk: Procedure volume slowdown, competition from Medtronic/J&J, high valuation

JNJ.note: healthcare conglomerate. Pharma + med devices + consumer. Spinning off Kenvue. Defensive staple.
JNJ.risk: Talc litigation overhang, pharma patent cliffs, consumer weakness

JPM.note: biggest US bank. Universal banking model. Fortress balance sheet under Jamie Dimon.
JPM.risk: Rate cuts compress NII, credit cycle deterioration, regulatory burden

KLAC.note: process control equipment for chip fabs. Near-monopoly in defect inspection.
KLAC.risk: Inspection equipment cycle, China export risk, fab capex deferral

LCID.note: luxury EV maker. Burning cash, Saudi-backed. Production ramp is the only thing that matters.
LCID.risk: Cash burn runway, production ramp delays, Saudi ownership overhang. Not investable without execution.

LLY.note: pharma giant riding the GLP-1 obesity wave. Mounjaro/Zepbound revenue compounding. Duopoly with Novo Nordisk.
LLY.risk: GLP-1 supply constraints, Novo Nordisk competition, insurance formulary pushback

LMND.note: AI-native insurance disruptor. Home / renters / pet coverage. Loss ratio -> profitability path.
LMND.risk: loss ratio volatility, catastrophic event exposure, cash runway to profitability

LMT.note: defense prime. F-35, missile systems. Government budget dependent.
LMT.risk: Defense budget cuts, program delays, cost overruns

LRCX.note: wafer fab equipment. Highly leveraged to NAND capex cycles.
LRCX.risk: NAND capex cuts, China export exposure, memory cycle downturn hitting WFE spend

LULU.note: premium athleisure. Lululemon brand. International expansion. Peloton adjacency.
LULU.risk: Growth normalization, inventory mismanagement, international execution

META.note: Facebook + Instagram ad machine prints cash. Reality Labs is a long-term metaverse bet.
META.risk: Reels monetization lag, Reality Labs cash drain, ad market cyclicality

MDB.note: NoSQL database. Atlas cloud revenue growing 30%+. Developer mindshare leader.
MDB.risk: Atlas growth deceleration, competition from Snowflake and Databricks, developer preference shifts

MPC.note: oil refiner + midstream + retail. Marathon brand. Crack spread sensitive.
MPC.risk: Crack spread collapse, renewable transition, refining overcapacity

MRK.note: big pharma. Keytruda is the world's top-selling drug. Animal health spin. Patent cliff coming.
MRK.risk: Keytruda patent cliff, pipeline setbacks, animal health spin execution

MRVL.note: semiconductor networking + custom AI silicon. Data center and 5G infra exposure.
MRVL.risk: data center buildout slowdown, custom silicon competition, China telecom exposure

MS.note: investment bank + E*Trade + asset management. Wealth management fees.
MS.risk: Trading/M&A cyclicality, wealth management fee pressure, credit losses

MSFT.note: Azure is #2 cloud, Office is a monopoly, OpenAI partnership gives them AI distribution.
MSFT.risk: Azure growth deceleration, AI monetization lag, OPEX bloat from OpenAI investment

MU.note: DRAM/NAND memory cyclical. AI demand driving HBM pricing power. Boom-bust name.
MU.risk: Memory glut if AI demand slows, capex overbuild risk, China DRAM competition (CXMT)

NET.note: Cloudflare. CDN, zero-trust, edge compute. Internet infrastructure layer.
NET.risk: SASE competition from ZS and PANW, zero-trust market fragmenting, code-key incident reputation risk

NFLX.note: streaming leader. Ad-tier and password crackdown driving subscriber growth. Content moat.
NFLX.risk: Content spend arms race, ad-tier ARPU dilution, sub saturation in developed markets

NIO.note: Chinese EV maker. Battery swap stations. Competitive with Tesla / BYD in China.
NIO.risk: China EV price war, cash burn, geopolitical delisting risk

NKE.note: sportswear global leader. Direct-to-consumer pivot. China market exposure.
NKE.risk: China demand weakness, inventory glut, DTC execution

NOW.note: ServiceNow. Enterprise workflow SaaS. ITSM leader. AI copilots.
NOW.risk: IT spend slowdown, workflow commoditization, AI feature pricing pressure

NVDA.note: GPU monopoly for AI training. Data center revenue compounding 80%+. CUDA moat is unbreachable near-term.
NVDA.risk: AI capex air pocket, China export restrictions, AMD/Google internal chip competition

NXPI.note: automotive semiconductor. EV power electronics, radar, secure connectivity.
NXPI.risk: Auto demand slowdown, EV adoption plateau, China exposure

OKTA.note: identity management. SSO and access control. Margins expanding post-Salesforce competition.
OKTA.risk: Security incident overhang, Salesforce competition in identity, large-deal cycle elongation

ON.note: ON Semiconductor. Power management, SiC for EVs. Industrial + automotive.
ON.risk: EV demand slowdown, industrial inventory destocking, SiC competition

ORCL.note: enterprise database and cloud. Multi-cloud database. Cerner healthcare data. AI RAG.
ORCL.risk: Cloud growth deceleration, Cerner integration, AI RAG competition

OXY.note: oil and gas. Permian focus. Buffett-backed. Occidental / Anadarko synergies.
OXY.risk: Oil price collapse, Permian cost inflation, Berkshire ownership overhang

PANW.note: Palo Alto Networks. Enterprise firewall + security platform. SASE and zero-trust.
PANW.risk: Platformization execution, billings deceleration, SASE competition

PARA.note: Paramount Global. CBS, cable, Paramount+. Streaming wars. M&A target (Skydance deal).
PARA.risk: Linear TV decline, streaming losses, M&A uncertainty

PATH.note: UiPath. Robotic process automation (RPA). Enterprise automation, AI integration.
PATH.risk: RPA commoditization by AI agents, growth deceleration, profitability path

PAYO.note: cross-border payments for SMBs and freelancers. Emerging market revenue. Take rate expansion story.
PAYO.risk: regulatory scrutiny on cross-border payments, FX volatility, SMB customer churn

PFE.note: pharma. COVID windfall gone. Oncology rebuild via Seagen acquisition. Pipeline dependent.
PFE.risk: Pipeline setbacks, Seagen integration, patent cliffs

PINS.note: visual search and social commerce. Ad recovery play. Amazon partnership driving monetization.
PINS.risk: User growth plateau, Amazon partnership revenue ramp uncertain, ad market cyclicality

PLTR.note: government and enterprise data analytics. AI platform expansion driving commercial growth.
PLTR.risk: Government contract lumpiness, high multiple means growth miss punishes the stock

PSTG.note: Pure Storage. Flash storage arrays. Evergreen subscription model. Enterprise IT spend.
PSTG.risk: IT spend slowdown, competition from incumbents, consumption growth volatility

PSX.note: downstream refiner and midstream. Phillips 66. Energy infrastructure consolidation.
PSX.risk: Crack spread collapse, energy transition, midstream regulatory risk

PYPL.note: digital payments. Braintree growing, branded checkout losing share to Apple Pay.
PYPL.risk: Branded checkout losing share to Apple Pay, Braintree take rate compression, turnaround execution risk

QCOM.note: mobile Snapdragon chips and 5G modems. Apple modem threat looming.
QCOM.risk: Apple in-house modem threat, handset cycle weakness, royalty disputes

REGN.note: biotech. Dupixent franchise (dermatitis, asthma). Monoclonal antibody platform powerhouse.
REGN.risk: Dupixent competition, patent cliffs, pipeline setbacks

RELY.note: digital remittance platform. Competing with Western Union wire transfers. Latam volume growth.
RELY.risk: remittance volume tied to immigration flows, FX headwinds, regulatory licensing

RIVN.note: adventure EV trucks and vans. Amazon delivery fleet contract is the lifeline. Cash burn is critical risk.
RIVN.risk: Cash burn is existential, Amazon van contract renegotiation risk, pickup truck demand weakening

RKLB.note: small launch vehicle. Neutron rocket development is the next catalyst. Space systems revenue growing.
RKLB.risk: Launch failure risk, Neutron rocket schedule slippage, small-launch market limited, cash runway

ROKU.note: streaming device and platform. Roku OS for TV OEMs. Ad inventory monetization.
ROKU.risk: Platform competition, ad market cyclicality, account growth saturation

RTX.note: defense and aerospace. Pratt & Whitney engines, Collins. Supply chain recovery.
RTX.risk: Engine recall costs, defense budget pressure, supply chain disruption

S.note: AI-native endpoint security. Growth rate slowing but differentiation vs CRWD is the debate.
S.risk: CRWD competitive pressure, growth rate slowing, path to profitability longer than peers

SCHW.note: brokerage and wealth. Zero-commission model, NIM sensitive to rates.
SCHW.risk: Rate cuts compress NIM, deposit outflows, trading volume decline

SGEN.note: biotech, acquired by Pfizer. ADC (antibody-drug conjugate) oncology tech.
SGEN.risk: Integration with Pfizer, pipeline competition, ADC market saturation

SHOP.note: e-commerce platform for SMBs. Merchant solutions revenue growing. Margin turnaround story.
SHOP.risk: SMB churn in downturn, competitive pressure from Amazon and WooCommerce, revenue take rate pressure

SLB.note: oilfield services. Completion, drilling, digital. Rig count levered.
SLB.risk: Rig count collapse, energy transition, international project delays

SNAP.note: ephemeral social media. Snap Ads and AR lens. Alternatives to Meta.
SNAP.risk: Ad market cyclicality, Meta competition, ARPU stagnation

SNOW.note: cloud data warehouse. Consumption model. Growth slowing, profitability improving.
SNOW.risk: Consumption growth slowing, competition from Databricks and BigQuery, NRR declining

SNPS.note: Synopsys. EDA + IP for chip design monopoly. AI design tools acquisition.
SNPS.risk: Semiconductor cycle downturn, AI design disruption, Ansys integration

SOFI.note: neobank with lending, deposits, and Galileo fintech infra. Student loan refinancing origin story.
SOFI.risk: student loan refinancing policy risk, deposit beta pressure, Galileo customer concentration

SPOT.note: audio streaming leader. Premium subscriber growth and margin expansion from cost discipline.
SPOT.risk: Label relationship renegotiation, podcast investment ROI unclear, ad-tier margin dilution

SQ.note: fintech ecosystem. Cash App and Square POS. Bitcoin revenue is volatile, margins are the story.
SQ.risk: Cash App regulatory scrutiny, Bitcoin revenue volatility, forward-guidance risk from macro sensitivity

SWKS.note: Skyworks. RF semiconductors for smartphones and IoT. Apple concentration risk.
SWKS.risk: Apple concentration, handset cycle weakness, RF competition

TEAM.note: Atlassian. Jira + Confluence developer tools. Cloud shift. Team collaboration.
TEAM.risk: Microsoft competition, IT spend slowdown, cloud migration saturation

TER.note: semiconductor test equipment leader. Robotics/automation arm. Cyclical recovery tied to chip demand.
TER.risk: memory overbuild cutting test demand, auto/robotics slowdown, China fab restrictions

TMO.note: life sciences tools and diagnostics giant. Biopharma capex cycle. M&A roll-up strategy.
TMO.risk: biopharma R&D budget cuts, China diagnostics competition, M&A integration risk

TMUS.note: mobile carrier. 5G network leader. Customer poaching from Verizon/AT&T.
TMUS.risk: Price war with Verizon/AT&T, spectrum costs, regulatory scrutiny

TSLA.note: EV market leader losing share to BYD and legacy OEMs. Real optionality is FSD and robotaxi.
TSLA.risk: EV demand normalization, FSD timeline slippage, China price war crushing margins

TTD.note: Trade Desk. Programmatic ad tech platform. Connected TV (CTV) growth. Cookie deprecation play.
TTD.risk: CTV growth deceleration, Google competition, DSP commoditization

TXN.note: Texas Instruments. Analog and embedded semiconductors. Industrial + auto dividend aristocrat.
TXN.risk: Industrial/auto downturn, inventory destocking, China demand weakness

TWLO.note: cloud communications API. Engagement data platform expanding. Path to profitability is the thesis.
TWLO.risk: Growth deceleration, competitive pressure from AWS Pinpoint and Bandwidth, path to GAAP profitability unproven

UBER.note: ride-share and delivery dominance. FCF inflection. Autonomous vehicle partner risk.
UBER.risk: AV partners could disintermediate, driver supply/demand imbalance, regulatory pressure on gig classification

UNH.note: managed care titan — health insurance, pharmacy benefits (Optum), Medicare. Moves on CMS rates and drug pricing policy.
UNH.risk: CMS rate cuts, GLP-1 cost inflation for insurers, regulatory overhaul risk

UNP.note: Union Pacific Railroad. Cross-country freight. Economic activity barometer.
UNP.risk: Freight volume slowdown, labor inflation, derailment/operational risk

UPS.note: parcel delivery duopoly with FedEx. B2C e-commerce spikes. Margin compression.
UPS.risk: Volume slowdown, labor costs, Amazon logistics competition

UPST.note: AI-powered lending marketplace. Personal / auto loans. High credit-cycle beta.
UPST.risk: recession -> loan defaults spike, funding partner pullback, AI model bias scrutiny

V.note: payments network duopoly. VisaNet infrastructure. Cross-border volume recovery.
V.risk: Cross-border slowdown, regulatory pressure on swipe fees, fintech disruption

VEEV.note: life sciences SaaS. Pharma CRM, clinical data, and marketing. Subscription model for biotech.
VEEV.risk: Biotech spending cuts, CRM competition, growth deceleration

VRTX.note: gene therapy. Cystic fibrosis monopoly (Trikafta). Casgevy CRISPR launch for sickle cell.
VRTX.risk: Trikafta patent cliff, gene therapy competition, Casgevy adoption

WBD.note: Warner Bros Discovery. HBOMax + Discovery+ merger. Content cost cutting focus.
WBD.risk: Streaming losses, content spend pressure, linear TV decline

WFC.note: US bank, recovering from scandals. Consumer focused. Rate and turnaround story.
WFC.risk: Asset cap lingering, consumer credit deterioration, rate sensitivity

WMT.note: retail fortress. Walmart US, Sam's Club, international. Grocery + omnichannel.
WMT.risk: Margin pressure from grocery mix, Amazon competition, consumer trade-down

XOM.note: supermajor oil. Upstream + downstream + chemicals. Permian and Guyana acceleration.
XOM.risk: Oil price collapse, energy transition pressure, project cost overruns

XPEV.note: Chinese EV maker. XPeng. Autonomous driving focus. Sedan / SUV models.
XPEV.risk: China EV price war, cash burn, geopolitical delisting risk

ZBH.note: orthopedic devices. Knees, hips, spine. Elective procedure recovery.
ZBH.risk: Elective procedure slowdown, pricing pressure, robotics competition

ZS.note: zero-trust security gateway. Cloud-native. Competing with NET in SASE market.
ZS.risk: SASE market crowding, zero-trust commoditization, sales cycle lengthening
